description_long: This object is a rustic, wooden bench-style table with a backrest, constructed from thick, roughly hewn planks. The surface and backrest display a natural wood grain texture, with visible undulations and slight imperfections that give it a handcrafted appearance. The table is supported by four sturdy, blocky legs, each set at the corners for stability. The backrest consists of two wide horizontal planks, slightly angled for comfort, while the seat is a single broad plank. The wood is finished in a uniform, matte brown color, suggesting it is untreated or lightly stained for outdoor durability. There are no visible decorative elements or hardware, emphasizing a simple, utilitarian design suitable for parks or public outdoor spaces.
description: A rustic, wooden bench-style table with a backrest, made from thick, textured planks and finished in matte brown. Its simple, sturdy design is ideal for outdoor urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide seat plank, two-plank backrest, and four sturdy legs, highlighting the bench's inviting, functional design.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thickness of the seat and backrest planks, as well as the slight backward angle of the backrest for comfort.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the two-plank backrest and the supporting legs, with visible wood grain and structural simplicity.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the plank thickness and the alignment of the legs and backrest.
